params.name: Alexander's Sarcophagus
params.description: This sarcophagus, made from the finest marble of the time, is approximately four meters in length, three meters in width, and two meters in height, and is very well preserved. The central part of the sarcophagus features a lifelike carving of a human figure, depicting Alexander the Great leading his army into battle against the Persians. The figure with blond hair on horseback at the far left of the sarcophagus is believed to be Alexander himself, showcasing his valor and invincibility. There ar …
